name: Newsletter Growth Engine
description: Build and monetize an email audience with a proven signup funnel and welcome sequence

automation.followUp: Send Email #2 on day 3, Email #3 on day 7
Send weekly value email every Tuesday

assets.title: Newsletter Signup Page
assets.content:
HEADLINE:
[Benefit-driven outcome] in [timeframe] — delivered to your inbox every [frequency]

SUBHEADLINE:
Join [X]+ [your audience type] who get [what you send] every [day] to [achieve outcome].

BULLET POINTS (What they get):
• [Specific value 1] — so you can [outcome]
• [Specific value 2] — without [pain/obstacle]
• [Specific value 3] — even if [common objection]
• [Bonus value 4]

SOCIAL PROOF:
"[Short testimonial about the newsletter's value.]"
— [Name], [Role]

CTA BUTTON: Join [number] readers — It's free

FINE PRINT:
No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Your email is safe with me.

---
ABOUT THE AUTHOR (sidebar or below fold):
[Your name] is a [your role] who helps [audience] achieve [outcome]. Every [frequency], [your name] shares [what makes your newsletter unique].

assets.title: Welcome Email #1 — The Promise
assets.content:
Subject: Welcome — here's what to expect

Hey [First Name],

You're in. Welcome to [Newsletter Name].

Every [frequency], you'll get [what you deliver] — [the core promise in one sentence].

Here's what makes this different from every other newsletter in your inbox:

[YOUR UNIQUE ANGLE — be specific about what you cover and how you cover it]

I started this because [your origin story — 2-3 sentences max].

What you'll get from here:
→ [Benefit 1]
→ [Benefit 2]
→ [Benefit 3]

Quick favor: reply to this email and tell me — what's the #1 thing you're hoping to learn or solve?

I read every reply. And knowing this helps me make the newsletter more useful for you.

More soon,
[Your name]

P.S. While you wait for the next issue, here's the most popular thing I've ever shared: [link to best content]

assets.title: Welcome Email #2 — The Best Of
assets.content:
Subject: My best stuff, all in one place

Hey [First Name],

Before I send you the next issue, I wanted to share my most useful resources with you.

Think of this as your orientation guide.

📌 Most popular: [Title]
[Link] — [One sentence on why this is valuable]

📌 Most shared: [Title]
[Link] — [One sentence on why this resonates]

📌 Most practical: [Title]
[Link] — [One sentence on the takeaway]

📌 My origin story: [Title]
[Link] — [Why this one matters]

If you only have 10 minutes, start with [the most important one].

Next issue comes out [day]. I'll be covering [topic preview — build anticipation].

Talk soon,
[Your name]

assets.title: Welcome Email #3 — The Invitation
assets.content:
Subject: One more thing

Hey [First Name],

This is the last email in the welcome series — from here, you'll just get the regular [frequency] newsletter.

Before I go, I want to ask:

Are you dealing with any of these right now?

□ [Problem 1 your audience faces]
□ [Problem 2]
□ [Problem 3]
□ [Problem 4]

If any of those hit home, I'd love to chat for 15 minutes.

No pitch. Just a conversation to understand what you're working on and see if I can point you in the right direction.

[LINK TO CALENDAR or "Just reply to this email"]

If now isn't the right time, no worries — just keep an eye on your inbox. I'll be sharing [upcoming topic] next [day].

Thanks for being here,
[Your name]

P.S. If you know someone who would benefit from this newsletter, forward it to them. The best compliment you can give me is a referral.

assets.title: Nurture Email — Weekly Value
assets.content:
Subject: [Specific insight or tip — make it concrete]

Hey [First Name],

[OPENING HOOK — a surprising stat, bold claim, or personal story in 1-3 sentences]

[MAIN CONTENT — 200-400 words]

This week I want to share [topic].

[Your insight, story, or lesson]

Here's what this means for you:

[Practical takeaway 1]
[Practical takeaway 2]
[Practical takeaway 3]

[CALL TO ACTION — one of the following:]
→ Hit reply and tell me: [relevant question]
→ Here's the tool/resource I mentioned: [link]
→ If you want to go deeper on this, I put together [resource]: [link]

Until next [day],
[Your name]

---
[Newsletter Name] | [Your tagline]
You're receiving this because you signed up at [website].
[Unsubscribe] | [View in browser]

assets.title: Content Prompt #1 — Newsletter Teaser
assets.content:
This week in [Newsletter Name]:

→ [Teaser for main article — make them curious]
→ [Teaser for secondary content]
→ [Bonus tip or resource]

If you're not subscribed yet, you're missing out.

[LINK TO SIGNUP]

Free. [Frequency]. No fluff.

assets.title: Content Prompt #2 — Milestone Post
assets.content:
[X] people now read [Newsletter Name] every [frequency].

When I started, I had [small number] subscribers and zero idea what I was doing.

Here's what I've learned about growing an audience from scratch:

1. [Lesson 1]
2. [Lesson 2]
3. [Lesson 3]

If you're not on the list yet, here's what you're getting:

[What the newsletter covers in 2-3 bullets]

[LINK TO SIGNUP] — it's free.

assets.title: Content Prompt #3 — Value Preview
assets.content:
Here's a sneak peek from this week's [Newsletter Name]:

"[PULL QUOTE from your newsletter — the most insightful or useful line]"

The full breakdown (including [what else is in the issue]) is in the newsletter.

Join [X]+ readers: [SIGNUP LINK]

Free to subscribe. Takes 30 seconds.

assets.title: Content Prompt #4 — Social Proof
assets.content:
Got this reply from a subscriber last week:

"[REAL SUBSCRIBER REPLY or testimonial about the newsletter]"
— [Name], [Role]

This is exactly why I write [Newsletter Name].

If you want [the outcome your newsletter delivers], join [X]+ readers:

[SIGNUP LINK]

Free. Unsubscribe anytime.

assets.title: Content Prompt #5 — Direct Ask
assets.content:
Every [day], I send one email to [X]+ [audience type].

It covers [topic 1], [topic 2], and [topic 3].

It's free. It's [frequency]. And it takes [X] minutes to read.

The last issue covered: [recent topic — link if public]

Join here: [SIGNUP LINK]

(Unsubscribe anytime — no hard feelings)
